name: Paxton's Tower & Tywi Valley
highlights: Gothic folly raised to Nelson with 360° panorama over Carmarthen's green valley.
viewpoints: 360° over Tywi flood plain; Botanic Gardens glasshouse visible
parking_start: NT Paxton's Tower car park (free, small)
food_drink_nearby: Y Polyn Capel Dewi; The Cothi Bridge Hotel Pontargothi
hazards_notes: Exposed summit — can be windy; livestock gates
